title: Dual N Back Lite App
description: An ultra-premium cognitive neuro-training utility based on scientifically proven working memory and fluid intelligence expansion protocols. Running entirely inside native browser layers, the platform pairs an automated synchronized interval timeline flashing blocks on a 3x3 geometric grid with simultaneous alphabetical text character cues. The application implements an array-backed rolling sequence tracking buffer that maps elements exactly N steps backward, custom zero-dependency audio sound wave generation built with native browser Web Audio API Oscillator nodes, and persistent high-score logs stored using LocalStorage parameters.
